title: heterotheca pilosa
intro: Heterotheca pilosa, also known as hairy false goldeneye, is a flowering plant in the daisy family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal activities. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and treating respiratory problems. Heterotheca pilosa can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, as well as being used in ointments and salves.
